Capability

What we deliver

Our expertise spans the entire project lifecycle. We don't just pour concrete; we see it through.

Commercial Construction

Grade-A office space, retail malls and hospitality projects delivered to global standards.

  • High-rise shells
  • MEP coordination
  • Fit-out management

Residential Builds

From luxury single-family homes to large-scale residential estates and apartments.

  • Estate infrastructure
  • Luxury finishing
  • Multi-unit speed builds

Civil Engineering

Critical infrastructure projects that support movement, power and industry.

  • Roads & Bridges
  • Site drainage
  • Piling & Earthworks

Project Management

Professional oversight for owners who need engineering discipline on third-party sites.

  • Cost auditing
  • Timeline recovery
  • Quality assurance

Design-Build

Integrated architectural and engineering services for a seamless single-point of contact.

  • Feasibility reviews
  • Regulatory approvals
  • Turnkey delivery

Industrial & Power

Specialized construction for factories, warehouses and utility infrastructure.

  • Heavy foundations
  • Cold storage shells
  • Power substations

Not sure which service fits?

Tell us about your project — we'll route you to the right team.

Get in touch
Sterling & Vale

Building Nigeria's skyline since 2007. Commercial, residential, and civil construction delivered on time, on budget, on standard.
